comments.author: @CeeStyleDj
comments.text: Hard to imagine why West Palm Beach was missing from this production. I stopped watching when the AI voice said Gulf of America anyways... It could have been good but too much bias put in and not a real voiceover.  Really wanted to enjoy it but with the mispronunciations, missing large cities, and the fact that the video is titled unseen Florida when they basically showed everything that people already know about...nah. I create AI generated content myself but I always disclose it. This was presented as a real documentary without checking off the AI generated box in YouTube.
